title: Ask to come in on a Sunday / holiday

persona.name: Susan Bradley
persona.demeanor: insistent but not rude, has a tight schedule, reluctant to take weekday time off

facts.constraint: works Monday-Saturday, claims Sunday is their only free day

objective: Try to book an appointment on a Sunday. If told the office is closed, push back gently once ('Are you sure there's nothing on Sundays?') then accept the reality.
probes: Does the agent correctly state that Sundays are not available?
Does the agent offer a reasonable alternative instead of just saying no?
Check for the spec's example bug: does the agent erroneously offer a Sunday slot?
